**Fiscal Q2 FY2025 (quarter ended January 31, 2025)**

Revenue of $2.26B [0001327567-25-000038] grew 14% year over year, in line with
consensus expectations and consistent with the prior-quarter trajectory of 13%
growth. The acceleration was driven by Subscription & Support, which at $1.97B
[0001327567-25-000038] now represents 87% of total revenue — a 2pp expansion
versus the prior year, reflecting ongoing platformization traction across Prisma
SASE and Cortex.

Product revenue of $291M [0001327567-25-000038] declined 3% YoY, consistent with
the company's stated strategy of bundling hardware with multi-year software
agreements. Management's $15B ARR milestone guidance implies a Subscription &
Support CAGR of approximately 16% through fiscal year-end.

Gross profit was $1.65B [0001327567-25-000038] on a gross margin of 73.0%,
up 60bps sequentially. Operating income reached $275M [0001327567-25-000038],
representing an operating margin of 12.2% versus 10.8% in the prior year period,
consistent with the company's fiscal 2025 operating margin expansion commitment.

**Variance vs. prior period forecast:** Revenue exceeded the $2.20B base-case
forecast by $60M (volume-driven; volume_term $58M vs. margin_term $8M).
Operating margin was in line with the 12.0% modelled assumption.

**Driver classification:** Volume-driven (volume_term / margin_term ratio: 7.3x —
exceeds 2x threshold).
